name: CalmFalcon Eval — LLM Theme Quality Judge

parameters.content:
# CalmFalcon Eval 2 — LLM Theme Quality Judge
Run after the main pipeline. Sends each theme to GPT-4 Turbo for quality scoring across 4 dimensions. Costs ~$0.10–0.30 per run depending on theme count.

**Scores (1–5):** Enterprise Relevance · Signal Type Accuracy · Actionability · Summary Quality
**Output:** Per-theme scores + flags/highlights + aggregate verdict with weakest/top theme

▶ START
Manual trigger — run after main pipeline completes

nodes.name: Fetch Themes for Judging
nodes.notes: Fetches latest pipeline run + all themes for that week. Outputs one item per theme.

parameters.content:
FETCH
Loads all themes from Supabase for the latest run. One output item per theme.

nodes.name: Build Judge Prompt
nodes.notes: Collapses all per-theme items into one batch prompt. Sends all themes to GPT-4 in a single call.

parameters.content:
BUILD PROMPT
Collapses all themes into one structured judge prompt. Single LLM call = lower cost.

nodes.name: GPT-4 Turbo Judge
nodes.notes: Calls OpenAI API directly via httpRequest — avoids n8n template expression type coercion bugs. Reads OPENAI_API_KEY from workflow variables.

parameters.content:
LLM JUDGE
GPT-4 Turbo via direct httpRequest. Reads OPENAI_API_KEY from workflow variables. json_object mode = no parse errors.

nodes.name: Parse & Format Results
nodes.notes: Parses GPT-4 JSON, builds aggregate stats (dim averages, top/weakest theme, all flags), renders markdown report.

parameters.content:
RESULTS
Parses scores, builds per-theme table + aggregate verdict. Check node output for the full markdown report.

nodes.name: Save Report to Supabase
nodes.notes: Inserts one row into eval_reports with per-theme scores as JSONB. Run CREATE TABLE from supabase-schema.sql first.

parameters.content:
SAVE
Persists verdict + per-theme scores + markdown to eval_reports table for trend tracking.
